Kadir Has University

Faculty of Art and Design

Kadir Has University Faculty of Art and Design aims to educate students in the fields of art, design and architecture with a creative and innovative educational approach.

The faculty provides its students with an interdisciplinary perspective through departments such as Industrial Design, Interior Architecture, Architecture and Theater, bringing qualified and original professionals to the sector. Education is enriched with practical studies supported by theoretical knowledge, and students are offered extensive international experience opportunities.
